negative: tiny fully specified work or read-only exploration
single-path fully specified state change with no cross-boundary side effect, reconciliation behavior, or adjacent entry point
positive: behavior, scope, user-visible result, or architecture decision is materially ambiguous
state-changing work spans multiple entry points or system boundaries whose reads, writes, side effects, synchronization, or query visibility can differ
delete, remove, sync, reconcile, restore, status, lifecycle, retry, or backfill semantics may vary by platform, local service, device, client/H5, bulk, scheduled, or recovery path
